{
  "found_count": 12,
  "gaps": [
    {
      "severity": "CRITICAL",
      "title": "XSS in Signup Form",
      "breaks": "User can inject malicious scripts that execute in other users' browsers",
      "scenario": "Attacker enters '<script>alert(\"XSS\")</script>' as their username during signup",
      "prompt": "Write a test that attempts to submit HTML/script tags through the signup form's username field and verifies they are properly sanitized or encoded before being stored/displayed"
    },
    {
      "severity": "CRITICAL",
      "title": "Token Storage in LocalStorage",
      "breaks": "Authentication tokens accessible to malicious scripts via XSS",
      "scenario": "After login, token is stored in localStorage, making it vulnerable to XSS attacks",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies authentication tokens are not stored in localStorage or sessionStorage, but are properly secured in memory-only or HttpOnly cookies"
    },
    {
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "title": "CSRF Vulnerability in Login",
      "breaks": "Unauthorized actions can be performed on behalf of authenticated users",
      "scenario": "Attacker tricks logged-in user into visiting a malicious site that makes requests to the login endpoint",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies anti-CSRF tokens are included in all state-changing authentication requests and that they are properly validated on the server"
    },
    {
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "title": "Race Condition in Auth State",
      "breaks": "Inconsistent authentication state during rapid login/logout attempts",
      "scenario": "User rapidly clicks login button multiple times before first request completes",
      "prompt": "Write a test that simulates rapid successive login attempts and verifies that only one request is processed and the auth state remains consistent"
    },
    {
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "title": "Error Message Information Disclosure",
      "breaks": "Detailed error messages reveal system information to attackers",
      "scenario": "Login attempt with invalid username returns 'User not found' vs 'Invalid password' revealing valid usernames",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies all authentication error messages are generic and do not reveal specific information about whether usernames exist or passwords are correct"
    },
    {
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "title": "Missing Input Validation",
      "breaks": "Malicious input can cause application errors or security issues",
      "scenario": "User submits extremely long username/password that could cause buffer overflow or UI issues",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies all form inputs have proper length restrictions and character set validation before submission"
    },
    {
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "title": "OAuth State Parameter Missing",
      "breaks": "OAuth authorization code interception attacks",
      "scenario": "Attacker intercepts OAuth callback without proper state validation",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies OAuth login flows include and properly validate state parameters to prevent CSRF attacks"
    },
    {
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "title": "Session Timeout Not Handled",
      "breaks": "Users experience unexpected behavior when sessions expire",
      "scenario": "User leaves page open, session expires, user tries to perform action without being redirected to login",
      "prompt": "Write a test that simulates session timeout during active use and verifies the user is properly redirected to login with appropriate error message"
    },
    {
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "title": "Password Field Not Cleared on Error",
      "breaks": "Sensitive information remains in form after failed submission",
      "scenario": "Failed login attempt leaves password visible in the form",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies password fields are cleared after failed authentication attempts while other fields may be preserved"
    },
    {
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "title": "Auth Context Not Properly Initialized",
      "breaks": "Inconsistent auth state during application initialization",
      "scenario": "App loads before auth context is fully initialized, showing incorrect auth state",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies the auth context properly initializes and handles the initial loading state before determining actual authentication status"
    },
    {
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "title": "Token Refresh Race Condition",
      "breaks": "Multiple concurrent token refresh attempts",
      "scenario": "User makes multiple API calls simultaneously when token is about to expire, causing multiple refresh requests",
      "prompt": "Write a test that simulates multiple concurrent API calls when a token is near expiration and verifies that only one refresh request is made"
    },
    {
      "severity": "CRITICAL",
      "title": "Logout Without Token Revocation",
      "breaks": "Tokens remain valid even after logout",
      "scenario": "User logs out but previously obtained tokens can still be used to make authenticated requests",
      "prompt": "Write a test that verifies logging out properly invalidates the server-side session and/or revokes the authentication token"
    }
  ]
}
